title: Just-Download (Product Platform)
description: Cross-platform video downloader platform with desktop, mobile, and Chrome extension support.
problem: Users needed a simple way to download media across platforms without switching tools.
architecture: Frontend → API Layer → Processing Engine → Delivery

title: Docker Multi-Environment Setup
description: Organized Docker setup for multiple stacks for isolated development.
problem: Managing multiple stacks locally without dependency conflicts.
architecture: Docker Compose → Containerized Services → Volume Mapping
impact: Clean development workflow and zero system conflicts.

title: Mood-Tab (Chrome Extension)
description: Animated motivational Chrome extension with mood-based background themes.
problem: New tab pages lacked personalization and emotional engagement.
architecture: Chrome API → Local Storage → UI Theme Engine
impact: Enhanced user engagement with mood-based experience.
